title: Front Office Manager - Postcard Hotels - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Postcard Hotels - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Postcard Hotels are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Postcard Hotels:
Postcard Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
